---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: "Quincy Greenee"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to overall public or Internet attitudes, and how they relate to voting trends. For example, the prevalence of memes, viral content, profile interactions, etc. and how voting trends are effected in these areas.
